bigpatent.notes: configs g+h (physics+electricity); abstracts capped to 8k chars

patentmatch.notes: SUBSTITUTE: spec's pakuvis/PatentMatch returns 404; BNNT/PatentMatch used instead (500 rows, instruction-tuning shape — small for Family B primary). Canonical HPI-Naumann PatentMatch (6.2M EPO pairs) needs direct-download wiring before W2 bench preflight.

mpep.notes: USPTO static-HTML mirror at https://www.uspto.gov/web/offices/pac/mpep; chapters scraped per mpep-0XXX.html TOC + per-section h1.page-title boundaries. Skipped (404 or empty): none. Raw HTML cached under _raw/ for re-extraction without re-fetch.

oa.notes: USPTO Office Action Research Dataset (4.4M actions 2008-2017). Download via USPTO data portal (https://www.uspto.gov/ip-policy/economic-research/research-datasets/) — needs portal account + bulk file fetch (CSV/Stata, multi-GB). Wire in W1-late.

gpat.notes: Google Patents Public Data BigQuery dataset (patents-public-data). Needs gcloud auth + google-cloud-bigquery + a US-only IPC-class filtered query (Family C landscape work). Wire in W2 alongside the RAG index build.
